title: ardisia dolichocalyx
intro: Ardisia dolichocalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae, commonly known as the long-stalked spindletree or long-stalked ardisia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ardisia dolichocalyx include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Ardisia dolichocalyx can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
